content.en:
In the assessment of the seventh level.

Ye Tian found that this assessment is not difficult, this level assessment only needs to master the ultimate will, this level is actually a formation, if the will does not reach the ultimate will, it is impossible to see through this formation.

And his will has reached the ultimate will, and he saw through it directly, and then directly passed through it, and came to the seventh layer of the ultimate tower.

The seventh floor of the Ultimate Tower.

Lin Tian didn't find any chance, it was empty, so he went directly to break through.

As soon as I entered this level, I saw a gray passage.

Upon entering, a breath of despair came over me.

It's not that he hasn't encountered the breath of despair, but this aura of despair seems to surpass everything, even if his will reaches the ultimate will, there is still a feeling that he can't bear it.

Under this breath of despair, he seemed to see the fall of his relatives around him, the destruction of the human race, the dissipation of everything, and the absence of anything between heaven and earth, only himself, lonely and endless years.

This feeling is too feeling, it is like magnifying the normal breath of despair by billions of trillions of times, even he can't bear it.

"Get out!"

Lin Tian returned to the seventh layer, gasping for breath, his ultimate will almost collapsed just now.

If you continue to stay there and stay forcibly, you will really die!

"I didn't expect that when I reached the ultimate will, I would almost collapse by this kind of despair!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't know what the purpose of this level assessment was, could it be that those ultimate supreme evil tastes were not successful?

"Probably not, the Ultimate Extremities don't get so boring. "

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, this kind of sharpening should be very necessary.

......

"The Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is very good, I have broken through to the seventh layer, but the level of the Despair Passage is not easy.!" said the Doomsday Extreme Venerable with a smile.

"Yes, the Despair Passage is one of the Seven Tribulations that mimics the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord's Attack on the Ultimate Extreme Venerable. "

"Despair, pain, anger, sorrow, excitement, greed, confusion!"

"One of the seven tribulations, despair is a relatively difficult level, I don't know how many ancient level Ultimate Realm Masters have fallen at this level. "

Shadow Sand Jizun said.

"Therefore, these eleven Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters are undoubtedly lucky, and they have this opportunity to sharpen, otherwise when they really go to the Ultimate Extreme Realm to attack, there is a high probability that they will fail. Doomsday Supreme said.

"Yes, although some Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters failed to attack the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and there was hope of surviving, they were also wasted. If they can break through these levels and come out of the Ultimate Tower, then there is a high probability that they can break through to the Ultimate Extreme. But at present, except for the great hope of the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerables, the hopes of the other Ultimate Realm Lords are not very great!" said the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable.

"Keep watching!"

Doomsday is extremely respectful.

......

"Go ahead into that passage of despair!"

Ye Tian went in again, and after feeling some despair, he came out again.

Next, he used this method to sharpen himself.

And he was able to hold on for longer and longer, and at the same time, he also discovered one thing, that is, his ultimate will seemed to become stronger and more perfect.

Although the previous ultimate will was strong, it was like a steel wire net, it seemed to be very tough, but there were still loopholes, and he was now filling these holes, turning the steel wire mesh into a steel wall.

The years passed.

The longer Ye Tian persisted, the farther and farther he could cross.

Hundreds of millions of Ultimate Era later.

Ye Tian would be able to reach the eighth layer if he forcibly rushed over, but he was not in a hurry to go over, he still wanted to continue to sharpen himself and strive to easily pass through this desperate passage.

After all, such a good place to sharpen yourself, once you miss it, it is not easy to come across.

So, he stayed for a long time.

Finally, on this day, he was able to stay in this desperate passage without changing his face.

Then, he passed through this desperate passage and came to the eighth level.

After reaching the eighth layer, he found that there were still no resources or opportunities here.

"It seems that the opportunity of the first few layers is to improve the strength of the Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord, and in the back, the opportunity is most likely to be the tempering in the assessment!" Ye Tian guessed.

This time.

The assessment is not despair, but pain.

As soon as he came in, endless pain struck, and every particle in his body was in pain, which was many times stronger than the pain caused by the fusion talent.

Despair is emotion, and pain is a real physical attack!

It seemed as if if he held on for a little longer, and he would have to fall unconscious, and he would die here completely.

So, he immediately withdrew.

"Pain passage, we have to sharpen it again!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the years that followed, he entered the pain channel again and again, and he didn't know how many kinds of pain he endured, and he didn't know how many times he entered.

The tempering of the endless years has gradually strengthened him in the aspect of bearing pain, and has also made the ultimate will sharpened more perfect and powerful.

Finally, he could easily withstand it in the pain channel.

"After going through the channel of despair and pain, my ultimate will has invisibly increased by three percent!"

This was also a surprise for Ye Tian.

He found that not only was he not afraid, but he was willing to enjoy it.

Of course, he is not a pervert, but a desire to improve his strength, perhaps it is this desire that has made him grow to this day, if (good Zhao's) is replaced by someone else, even if he has the golden finger of copying talent, he may become a salted fish, and he will not work hard to practice, and finally be wiped out by an irresistible person in a catastrophe.

Therefore, the main reason why he has been able to grow up to this day is to enjoy the fun of cultivation and the improvement of his strength, so that he can grow up.

Copying talents, it's just support!

Of course, without this assistance, he can't grow no matter how hard he tries.

After entering the ninth layer, he still did not encounter the assessment, and then continued to enter the assessment place.

This level is the anger channel, and all kinds of things that make him angry emerge in heaven and earth, and this emotion is amplified countless times, and it also makes him almost lose his mind in anger.

But soon, he came out and calmed down.

Compared to pain and despair, anger is easier.
